app.name: Rulyx
onboarding.title: Bluesky moderation made easy
onboarding.subtitle: Free  ·  Open source  ·  No ads  ·  No tracking
onboarding.moderation.title: Moderation
onboarding.moderation.desc: Browse lists, search for actors, import or export members, and compare lists.
onboarding.profile.title: Profile
onboarding.profile.desc: Inspect profiles, view labels and stats, and perform moderation actions.
onboarding.settings.title: Settings
onboarding.settings.desc: Manage accounts, clear cache, and review data classification.
onboarding.info.title: Info
onboarding.info.desc: Learn about the app, review workflows, and access privacy information.
onboarding.accounts.title: Accounts
onboarding.accounts.desc: Switch between saved accounts, add new accounts, and manage account labels.
account.switcher.label: Quick switch account
account.switcher.hint: Opens account switcher to change or manage accounts
settings.title: Settings
settings.clear_cache.confirm: Clear cached network and image data?
settings.clear_cache.message: Saved accounts and app passwords will not be removed.
info.keychain.title: Keychain-secured
info.keychain.desc: Account secrets never leave your device. All API calls go directly to your Bluesky PDS.
info.clearsky.desc: Blocking and blocked-by data is provided by ClearSky. ClearSky indexes block records from the Bluesky firehose and makes them available via a public API. No authentication is required.
info.legal.author: Author
lists.no_account.title: No Active Account
lists.no_account.desc: Add a Bluesky account in the Accounts tab to load lists.
profile.title: Profile
profile.missing_creds.title: Missing Credentials
profile.missing_creds.desc: This account no longer has a saved app password.
pending.title: Pending Actions
pending.empty.title: No Pending Actions
pending.empty.desc: Long-running operations like blocking followers will appear here.
account.add.title: Add Account
account.add.password_hint: The app stores the password securely in the iOS Keychain and uses it for Bluesky account access.
account.manage.title: Accounts
account.no_accounts.title: No Accounts
account.no_accounts.desc: Add your first Bluesky account to begin.
list.detail.delete_message: This permanently deletes the list and all its members. This cannot be undone.
list.detail.remove_members_message: This removes the selected member(s) from the list.
list.create.title: Create List
list.templates.title: List Templates
list.subscribe.title: Subscribe to List
list.subscribe.uri_footer: Paste the AT URI of a list (e.g. at://did:plc:.../app.bsky.graph.list/rkey) or a bsky.app profile URL.
list.subscribe.name: Name
list.search.title: Search Bluesky Users
list.search.keep_typing_desc: Type at least 2 characters to search Bluesky.
list.search.no_results_desc: No Bluesky accounts match your search.
lists.export.title: Export
lists.export.no_members_desc: Create a list and add members first.
list.members.title: Members
list.members.no_members_desc: Search for accounts above to add to this list.
list.members.no_matches_desc: No existing members match the current filter.
profile.search.hint: Type a handle or DID to search for a Bluesky account
profile.inspect.label: Inspect Bluesky profile
profile.inspect.hint: Performs a detailed profile lookup with stats and moderation info
profile.save_search.hint: Saves this search for quick access later
profile.add_account_first: Add and select an account first.
profile.no_lists: Profile listed on lists will appear here.
profile.no_starter_packs: No owned starter packs available for membership comparison.
profile.open_bluesky.label: Open in Bluesky
profile.open_bluesky.hint: Opens this profile in the official Bluesky app or web interface
profile.open_controls.label: Open Moderation Controls
profile.open_controls.hint: Opens a detail view with block, mute, and list membership actions
profile.result.hint: Shows detailed profile information for this account
list.detail.missing_creds.desc: This account no longer has a saved app password.
list.detail.subscribe.label: Subscribe
list.detail.edit.label: Edit
list.detail.delete.label: Delete
list.detail.remove_message: This removes {count} selected member(s) from the list.
list.members.filter_accessibility: Filter members by handle or name
list.compare.title: Compare and Transfer
list.compare.no_lists_desc: Create additional lists to use comparison and transfer tools.
list.compare.help_overlap: Overlap: members present in both lists.
list.compare.help_only_current: Only in current list: members unique to this list.
list.compare.help_only_other: Only in comparison list: members in the other list but not this one.
list.compare.help_copy: Copy adds selected members from the compared list to this list without affecting the source.
list.compare.help_move: Move transfers selected members from this list to the other, removing them from this list.
list.snapshot.title: Snapshot History
list.snapshot.no_changes: No membership changes in this comparison.
list.snapshot.help_1: Snapshots capture the full membership of this list at a point in time.
list.snapshot.help_2: Use the pickers to compare two historical snapshots and see what changed.
list.snapshot.help_3: New snapshots are created automatically after bulk operations.
list.snapshot.help_4: The diff shows exactly which members were added or removed between snapshots.
list.snapshot.help_5: Snapshots are stored locally and tied to this workspace.
list.import.title: Import Handles
list.import.paste_section: Paste Handles, DIDs, or Profile URLs
list.import.help_3: CSV rows with handles, DIDs, or profile URLs
list.import.help_5: Duplicate and already-present entries will be detected before import.
list.import_preview.title: Import Review
list.import_preview.skip_note: Already-present accounts will be skipped during import.
list.import_preview.help_ready: Ready: These accounts will be added to the list.
list.import_preview.help_already: Already in List: These accounts are already members and will be skipped.
list.import_preview.help_duplicate: Duplicate: Multiple entries in your import resolve to the same account.
list.import_preview.help_unresolved: Unresolved: These identifiers could not be found on Bluesky.
list.import_preview.help_write: Importing writes to the live Bluesky list immediately.
list.edit.title: Edit List
rel.block_message: Blocking prevents interaction and is treated as a destructive moderation action.
profile.block_all_warning: Warning: This will block every follower of this account. Use with caution.
profile.posts.title: Posts
profile.posts.empty_desc: This user hasn't posted anything yet.
profile.media.title: Media
profile.media.empty_desc: This user hasn't posted any images.
list.subscribe.error_uri: Enter a list AT URI or URL.

presets.no_presets_desc: Create reusable action sets for common moderation tasks.

rules.no_rules_desc: Create rules to automatically moderate accounts.

network.title: Network Graph
follower_diff.title: Follower Changes
follower_diff.no_changes_desc: Follower list is unchanged since last check.
follower_diff.baseline: Baseline captured. Next refresh will show changes.

settings.icloud.enabled_footer: Account handles and labels sync across your devices. App passwords stay on each device for security.
settings.icloud.disabled_footer: Enable to keep your account configuration consistent across devices.
settings.biometric_footer: Lock the app with {biometric} when it goes to the background.
settings.gif_services_desc: Add API keys from GIPHY, Tenor, and Imgur to search and post GIFs in your timeline. Get keys from developers.giphy.com, developers.google.com/tenor, and api.imgur.com.
lock_screen.biometric_subtitle: Authenticate with {biometric} to access your accounts and moderation data.
lock_screen.biometric_unavailable: Biometric authentication is not available on this device.

account.error.handle_and_password_requir: Handle and app password are required.

profile.save_search.label: Save current search query

list.row.label: {name}, {count} members
lists.refresh.label: Refresh lists
list.search.field.label: Search Bluesky by handle or name
list.search.load_more.label: Load more search results
list.search.load_more.hint: Fetches more matching accounts from Bluesky
list.search.paste.label: Paste handles or CSV to import
list.search.paste.hint: Opens a dialog to paste handles or CSV data for importing
list.search.import_file.label: Import from text file
list.search.import_file.hint: Opens a file picker to select a text file of handles to import
list.search.export_csv.label: Export members as CSV
list.search.export_csv.hint: Shares a CSV file containing all list members
list.members.filter.label: Filter members by handle or name
list.members.load_more.label: Load more list members
list.members.load_more.hint: Fetches the next page of list members
list.snapshot.help.label: Help with snapshots
list.snapshot.help.hint: Explains how snapshots track membership changes over time
list.compare.help.label: Help with list comparison
list.compare.help.hint: Explains the comparison buckets and available actions
actor_row.label: {title}, {handle}
info.feature.lists.browse: Browse curation and moderation lists with inline search and filtering.
info.feature.lists.bulk: Bulk add, remove, copy, and move members across lists with progress tracking.
info.feature.lists.import: Import handles from text, CSV, or files — preview before commit.
info.feature.lists.export: Export member lists and diff results as CSV.
info.feature.compare.compare: Compare lists and view overlap, only-in-A, and only-in-B buckets.
info.feature.compare.transfer: Copy or move selected members between lists in bulk.
info.feature.compare.export: Export diffs for offline review or archiving.
info.feature.export.posts: Export profile posts as CSV or JSON for review, sharing, or archive workflows.
info.feature.export.media: Browse images and videos with lightweight thumbnails before opening full previews.
info.feature.export.download: Download selected media to a folder with created-at filenames and compact error reporting.
info.feature.moderation.block: Block or mute from profile detail with confirmation dialogs.
info.feature.moderation.block_all: Block all followers of an account — runs as a background task.
info.feature.moderation.membership: View and toggle moderation-list membership directly from any profile.
info.feature.audit.snapshots: Local list snapshots captured on each load — compare any two.
info.feature.audit.log: Operation log tracks bulk actions with success and failure counts.
info.feature.audit.pending: Pending Actions sheet shows running tasks with progress and retry.
info.feature.audit.searches: Saved and recent profile searches persist across launches.
account.add.hint: Opens the form to add a new Bluesky account
account.discard_add.hint: Discards changes and closes the add account form
account.edit_label.hint: Sets a custom label to help identify this account
account.select_pds.hint: Selects the Bluesky PDS provider for this account
account.validate.hint: Validates credentials and adds the account

action_preset.duplicate.hint: Creates a copy of this action preset

action_preset.report.hint: Whether this preset reports the account
action_preset.save.hint: Saves this action preset with the configured actions
action_queue.cancel.hint: Cancels this queued action before it starts
action_queue.retry.hint: Re-runs this action for any failed items

network.analyze.hint: Analyzes the network relationship between the two selected accounts
profile.block.hint: Blocks this account from interacting with you
profile.block_all.hint: Blocks every account that follows this profile — queued as a background action
rel.add_to_list.hint: Adds this account to one of your moderation lists
rel.block.hint: Blocks this account from interacting with you
rel.close_picker.hint: Closes the list picker without adding
report.include_stats.hint: Toggles whether to include statistics in the report
settings.clear_cache.hint: Removes cached network data and images from the device
settings.debug_tools.hint: Enables additional debugging tools and logging
settings.language.hint: Changes the display language for the entire app
